steps.title: Set up the equation with profit of 800 dollars
steps.content: We need to find $x$ when the profit is 800 dollars. Using the function $p(x) = 5x - 210$, we set: $$5x - 210 = 800$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add 210 to both sides: $$5x = 1010$$ Divide both sides by 5: $$x = 202$$ They must sell 202 car stickers.
